metadata.description: Advanced Claude Code plugins for enforced dev workflows and best practices.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Enforced dev workflow (/dev + /spec + /prd) with dual-model review, independent evaluator architecture, AC-driven MODULE progress, aligned §N.M section numbering, ADR (Architecture Decision Records) system, upstream-alignment escape hatches, and worktree-parallel /dev. Includes `dev`, `spec`, `prd` skills plus opt-in statusline. Latest: 2.8.0 worktree-parallel /dev — 4 `worktree-*` subcommands backed by `worktree-helper.sh`; per-worktree `.dev-state/` via shared `.git/`; `/spec` + `/prd` stay single-flight. Earlier: 2.5.0 ADR system + 22-pair semantic conflict detection, 2.6.0 /prd scope discipline + Phase 3.0 boundary block, 2.7.0 upstream-alignment escape hatches (/dev §2.1.2 PRD/Spec change, §2.1.3 Core Logic drift, /spec §0.6 PRD-gap escalation).

plugins.name: claude-best-practice
plugins.description: Claude Code best practices: explore-plan-code discipline, verification-first development, context management, prompt scoping, and session strategy.

plugins.name: code-companion
plugins.description: macOS Dynamic Island for code agents. Floating status pill shows pending approvals and active sessions from Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI. Click to jump to terminal.
